ogTitle: Dhuragoon vs Diamond Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dhuragoon and Diamond Beach.
heading: Dhuragoon vs Diamond Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dhuragoon, New South Wales and Diamond Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dhuragoon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Diamond Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dhuragoon or Diamond Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dhuragoon has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Diamond Beach scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dhuragoon scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Diamond Beach scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dhuragoon or Diamond Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dhuragoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
